Description: You can use this card only if you have any Tera Pokémon in play. Choose up to 2 of your Benched [C] Pokémon and attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to each of them.

Name: Iris's Fighting Spirit
Description: You can use this card only if you discard another card from your hand. Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

Name: Light Ball
Description: Attacks used by the Pikachu ex this card is attached to do 50 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon ex (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Lillie's Determination
Description: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw 6 cards. If you have exactly 6 Prize cards remaining, draw 8 cards instead.

Name: Mega Signal
Description: Search your deck for a Mega Evolution Pokémon ex, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Mystery Garden
Description: Once during each player's turn, that player may discard an Energy card from their hand in order to draw cards until they have as many cards in their hand as they have [P] Pokémon in play.

Name: N's PP Up
Description: Attach a Basic Energy card from your discard pile to 1 of your Benched N's Pokémon.

Name: Night Stretcher
Description: Put a Pokémon or a Basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand.

Name: Nighttime Mine
Description: Attacks used by each Tera Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) cost [C] more.

Name: Poké Pad
Description: Search your deck for a Pokémon that doesn't have a Rule Box, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. (Pokémon ex, Pokémon V, etc. have Rule Boxes.)

Name: Premium Power Pro
Description: During this turn, attacks used by your [F] Pokémon do 30 more damage to your opponent's Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Surfer
Description: Switch your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand.

Name: Team Rocket's Archer
Description: You can use this card only if any of your Team Rocket's Pokémon were Knocked Out during your opponent's last turn. Each player shuffles their hand into their deck. Then, you draw 5 cards, and your opponent draws 3 cards.

Name: Team Rocket's Ariana
Description: Draw cards until you have 5 cards in your hand. If all of your Pokémon in play are Team Rocket's Pokémon, draw cards until you have 8 cards in your hand instead.

Name: Team Rocket's Factory
Description: Once during each player's turn, if they played a Supporter card that has "Team Rocket" in its name from their hand this turn, they may draw 2 cards.

Name: Team Rocket's Giovanni
Description: Switch your Active Team Rocket's Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Team Rocket's Pokémon. If you do, switch in 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon to the Active Spot.

Name: Team Rocket's Great Ball
Description: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for an Evolution Team Rocket's Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If tails, search your deck for a Basic Team Rocket's Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Team Rocket's Hypnotizer
Description: If the Team Rocket's Pokémon this card is attached to is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Team Rocket's Pokémon is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Asleep.

Name: Team Rocket's Petrel
Description: Search your deck for a Trainer card, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Team Rocket's Proton
Description: If you go first, you may use this card during your first turn. Search your deck for up to 3 Basic Team Rocket's Pokémon, reveal them, and put them into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Team Rocket's Transceiver
Description: Search your deck for a Supporter card that has "Team Rocket" in its name, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Team Rocket's Watchtower
Description: [C] Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) have no Abilities.

Name: Thick Scale
Description: The [N] Pokémon this card is attached to takes 50 less damage from attacks from your opponent's [G], [R], [W], or [L] Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

Name: Tool Scrapper
Description: Choose up to 2 Pokémon Tool cards attached to Pokémon in play (yours or your opponent's) and discard them.

Name: Ultra Ball
Description: You can use this card only if you discard 2 other cards from your hand. Search your deck for a Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.

Name: Urbain
Description: Draw 3 cards.

Name: Waitress
Description: Look at the top 6 cards of your deck and attach a Basic Energy card you find there to 1 of your Pokémon. Shuffle the other cards back into your deck.

Name: Prism Energy
Description: This card provides [C] Energy. If the Pokémon this card is attached to is a Basic Pokémon, this card provides every type of Energy but provides only 1 Energy at a time.

Name: Team Rocket's Energy
Description: This card can only be attached to a Team Rocket's Pokémon. If this card is attached to anything other than a Team Rocket's Pokémon, discard this card. As long as this card is attached to a Pokémon, it provides 2 in any combination of [P] Energy and [D] Energy.

Name: Erika's Tangela
Ability-Effect: Once during your turn, you may use this Ability. Search your deck for an Erika's Pokémon, reveal it, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck.
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

Name: Beautifly
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed.
Your opponent reveals their hand, and this attack does 80 damage for each Energy card you find there.

Name: Dustox

Effects: Your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Asleep and Poisoned.

Name: Budew
Effects: During your opponent's next turn, they can't play any Item cards from their hand.

Name: Ethan's Magcargo
Ability-Effect: If this Pokémon has no Energy attached, it has no Retreat Cost.
Effects: Discard up to 5 [R] Energy from this Pokémon. This attack does 70 damage for each card you discarded in this way.

Name: Numel
Ability-Effect: If this Pokémon is in the Active Spot and is damaged by an attack from your opponent's Pokémon (even if this Pokémon is Knocked Out), the Attacking Pokémon is now Burned.

Name: Scorbunny

Ability-Effect: Pokémon in play (both yours and your opponent's) lose any Ability that requires the Pokémon using it to Knock Out itself.

Name: Weavile

Name: Vikavolt
Effects: Switch this Pokémon with 1 of your Benched [L] Pokémon.

Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 more damage.

Name: Marill
Effects: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all damage from and effects of attacks done to this Pokémon.

Name: Banette

Ability-Effect: When your opponent's Active Pokémon is Knocked Out, flip a coin. If heads, take 1 more Prize card. The effect of Wonder Kiss doesn't stack.

During your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon can't retreat.

Name: Mightyena
